title: puck: set explicit USB VID/PID for RAK4631 board config
description: Why this exists: while validating project-LICHEN-9nrr.21, west build -b rak4631/nrf52840 lichen/apps/puck succeeded but Zephyr warned that CONFIG_USB_DEVICE_VID and CONFIG_USB_DEVICE_PID are still default test values. The RAK4631 puck config enables the USB device stack for CDC-ACM/SLIP, so product USB identifiers should be explicit like nearby bridge/native configs. What needs to be done: choose appropriate LICHEN puck USB VID/PID/product/manufacturer settings for lichen/apps/puck/boards/rak4631_nrf52840.conf, preserving CDC-ACM behavior, and verify the RAK4631 puck build is warning-clean apart from separately tracked non-native unused state warnings. As a code-generation/fix Bead, run two review passes before closing.
close_reason: Set explicit RAK4631 puck USB VID/PID/product/manufacturer values using the existing project RAK bridge VID/PID pattern while distinguishing the product as LICHEN Puck. Tests/builds: west build -b rak4631/nrf52840 lichen/apps/puck -d build/puck_rak4631_nrf52840 --pristine=always passed; generated .config has CONFIG_USB_DEVICE_VID=0x239A, CONFIG_USB_DEVICE_PID=0x0029, CONFIG_USB_DEVICE_PRODUCT="LICHEN Puck", CONFIG_USB_CDC_ACM=y, and CONFIG_SLIP=y; git diff --check passed. Review pass 1: no findings; verified the default Zephyr VID/PID warnings no longer appear and CDC-ACM/SLIP remain enabled. Review pass 2: no findings; verified scope is limited to RAK4631 and the separate T1000-E USB warning remains tracked by project-LICHEN-9nrr.33.
